# Generated by tools/m5_roman_buildings.py --write.
# Named, one-level Roman civic and naval specials; historical ledger: docs/m5/roman_buildings.csv.

antq_aqua_virgo = {
	audio_tier = 2
	is_special = yes
	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = laborers
	max_levels = 1
	category = infrastructure_category
	employment_size = generic_peasant_building_employment
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes
	build_time = infrastructure_build_time
	modifier = {
		local_population_capacity = 1.0
		local_monthly_food_modifier = 0.03
	}
	unique_production_methods = {
		antq_aqua_virgo_maintenance = {
			masonry = 0.12
			tools = 0.04
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	construction_demand = town_building_construction
}

	build_time = cultural_building_time
	modifier = {
		local_cultural_tradition = 0.08
		local_unrest = -0.01
	}
	unique_production_methods = {
		antq_naumachia_augusti_maintenance = {
			lumber = 0.10
			naval_supplies = 0.08
			cloth = 0.05
			tar = 0.04
			tools = 0.04
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	construction_demand = town_building_construction
}

	employment_size = religious_building_employment

			masonry = 0.04
			incense = 0.025
			wine = 0.02
			tools = 0.01
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	construction_demand = town_building_construction
}

antq_curiae_veteres = {
	audio_tier = 2
	is_special = yes
	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = clergy
	max_levels = 1
	category = government_category
	employment_size = religious_building_employment
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes
	build_time = government_build_time
	modifier = {
		local_max_control = 0.01
		local_clergy_max_literacy = 0.005
	}
	unique_production_methods = {
		antq_curiae_veteres_maintenance = {
			masonry = 0.03
			beeswax = 0.02
			books = 0.01
			tools = 0.01
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	construction_demand = town_building_construction
}
